modules.summary: The Home Page & Search provides a unified search widget with tabs for Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars that collects service-specific criteria and validates input before redirecting to result listings.
modules.where_it_fits: This module is the application landing area reached via the Home top-navigation item and serves as the entry point for discovery workflows (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) that then route to their respective Search & Listing pages; it coexists with the global top navigation (Offers, Blog, Account) and precedes authenticated dashboard and booking flows.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is on the Home page (landing page) with a search tab selected or defaulted to one of Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars and ready to enter required search criteria.

modules.summary: Collects and validates user personal and contact information to create a new account and either log the user in or initiate email verification.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the Home page via the Account/Login option in the top navigation, this module is part of the onboarding flow that leads into the authenticated User Dashboard and booking lifecycle. It precedes features like Booking Management and Payment Processing by provisioning an authenticated user account.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor is unauthenticated and attempting to create an account (no existing registered account for the provided email) and has access to the registration form via Home -> Account/Login.

modules.summary: Handles user authentication via email/password and optional social providers, including error feedback, remember-me handling, and CAPTCHA on repeated failures.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Account/Login and reachable when a visitor attempts to access protected pages; successful authentication transitions the user into the Dashboard and booking/account flows within the main navigation (Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, etc.).
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is not authenticated (visiting Account/Login or redirected from a protected page)

modules.summary: Allows users to request a password reset by submitting their email so the system sends a 24-hour time-limited reset link if the address exists.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation's Account/Login area, this module is part of the authentication lifecycle alongside User Login and User Registration and leads to the password reset page and back to Login after completion.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is unauthenticated and has access to the Account/Login area and the email address associated with their account (or is attempting recovery for an unknown address).

modules.summary: Provides a hotel search form and dynamic listing of matching hotels with filters, sorting, and booking entry points.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the site's main navigation under Hotels or via the Home page search widget tabs, this module serves as the entry point for discovering available hotels and precedes the Hotel Details & Booking and Payment Processing flows in the booking lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is on the Home or Hotels section and has specified search parameters (destination and dates) or is prepared to enter them; user may be guest or authenticated.

modules.summary: Displays comprehensive hotel information (gallery, description, location, room types, pricing, reviews, and policies) and presents a room selection and booking form with a detailed price breakdown.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation via Hotels and from the Home Page search results, this module is the step after Hotels Search & Listing and precedes Payment Processing in the booking lifecycle; it feeds selected room and guest details into the payment flow and links to the User Dashboard for booking history after completion.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific hotel has been selected from Hotels Search & Listing (stay dates and guest count chosen); user authentication is required to complete the booking (viewing details may not require login).

modules.summary: Provides a search form for flight itineraries and a results listing showing available flights with details, filters, and sorting options.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Flights or via the home page search widget tabs, this module sits between initial trip input and booking: users submit flight search criteria here and are shown listings before proceeding to Flight Booking and Payment Processing.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User has arrived at the Flights section (from Home or top nav) and has entered valid search criteria (trip type, departure/arrival cities, dates, passenger counts, cabin class).

modules.summary: Presents a full flight itinerary and fare breakdown while collecting validated passenger and lead contact details (including passports, DOB, optional meal and seat preferences) prior to payment.
modules.where_it_fits: Reached from the top navigation Flights option or from the Flights Search & Listing results, this module is the booking-step that follows flight selection and precedes Payment Processing within the booking flow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific flight has been selected from Flights Search & Listing and the session contains the chosen itinerary, passenger count, cabin class, and calculated fares; user session is active (logged-in or guest).

modules.summary: Provides a search form and results listing for available tours, showing cards with images, key details (destination, duration, price, availability, rating) and sidebar filters and sorting options.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation (Tours) and the Home page search widget tabs, this module handles the discovery phase for tours by collecting search criteria and presenting filtered listings before users proceed to tour details and booking. It sits alongside other search/listing modules (Hotels, Flights, Cars) and feeds into the Tour Details & Booking flow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User has navigated to the Tours section (via top nav or Home search widget) and has entered or will enter required search criteria such as destination and travel dates.

modules.summary: Displays full tour information including images, day-by-day itinerary, inclusions/exclusions, departure dates, pricing, reviews, terms, and a booking form for traveler details and cost breakdown.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Tours or via the Tours Search & Listing results, this module presents detailed information after a tour is chosen and precedes the booking flow handled by Booking Management and Payment Processing. It is part of the user journey that starts from the Home search widget or Tours listing and moves toward account/checkout steps in the dashboard and payment modules.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific tour has been selected from Tours Search & Listing; the tour's availability and departure dates are loaded and the user session is either authenticated or will trigger a redirect to Login.

modules.summary: Provides a car rental search form and a dynamic listing of available vehicles grouped by category with detailed attributes, pricing, and filtering options.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the main navigation under Cars or via the home page search widget's Cars tab, this module handles the search input and displays results before booking and payment flows; it sits alongside other transport modules like Flights and Tours and feeds into the Car Booking and Payment Processing modules.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor has selected the Cars section (or used the home search widget) and has provided pick-up/drop-off locations and dates/times; user may be guest or authenticated.

modules.summary: Displays chosen vehicle and rental details with pricing, driver information form, optional add-ons and insurance selection, and confirmation controls to proceed to payment.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Cars or via the Home Page search widget's Cars tab, this module is the step after Cars Search & Listing where a selected vehicle and rental options are finalized before Payment Processing and Booking Management. It ties into the global navigation flow that includes Cars Search & Listing → Car Booking → Payment Processing and then the User Dashboard/Booking Management for post-booking actions.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific car and rental period (pick-up/drop-off locations and times) have been selected; user contact information available and user is either authenticated or proceeding as guest per site policy.

modules.summary: Displays country-specific visa requirements and provides a visa application form with document upload and tracking of application status.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Visa, this module sits alongside other booking-related sections (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the User Dashboard and Bookings area for application status and history. It is part of the end-to-end travel planning flow where users research requirements and submit service requests tied to their account.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in (authenticated) so applications can be submitted and tracked in the dashboard

modules.summary: A post-authentication hub that displays and manages a user’s bookings, profile, wallet/credits, wishlist, reviews, and account settings in one place.
modules.where_it_fits: Reached from the top navigation Account/Login after successful authentication, the Dashboard is the central user area following activity initiated from Home (search widget) or section-specific flows like Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars; it acts as the lifecycle hub for managing bookings, payments, and account preferences.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated (logged-in) user with an active session.

modules.summary: Displays detailed information for a specific booking (confirmation number, service and traveler details, payment and status) and provides options to modify or cancel the booking where permitted, with automated email notifications for status changes.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the User Dashboard/Booking Management area after authentication, this module is part of the post-booking lifecycle for managing existing reservations discovered via the main navigation (Account/Login → Dashboard → Booking Management). It complements listing and detail flows for Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars by handling downstream changes and cancellations.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated user with at least one existing booking selected (booking details available and subject to type-specific modification/cancellation rules)

modules.summary: Handles collection and processing of payment for a prepared booking, presenting a detailed price breakdown, multiple payment methods, and post-payment confirmation or error handling.
modules.where_it_fits: Located at the end of the booking flow after a user selects and reviews a Hotel, Flight, Tour, or Car (accessed from the Home search widget or respective section in the top navigation), it serves as the checkout/transaction step before the booking confirmation page and invoice delivery. The module is reachable from any booking path (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the User Dashboard/Booking Management for saved payment methods and booking records.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A prepared booking exists with a finalized price summary (base price, taxes, fees, discounts) and the user has an active session or guest booking session allowing checkout.

modules.summary: Selection controls for currency and language that update displayed prices and the site interface in real-time and persist preferences to the user profile or session/cookies.
modules.where_it_fits: Located in the top navigation bar (right side) and available across the Home, Search, and all section pages; it ties into the Home Page & Search and all booking/listing modules so prices, labels, and content reflect the chosen currency and language throughout the user journey.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible; user is either authenticated (profile available) or a guest with session/cookie support enabled.

modules.summary: Provides a consistent set of dynamic filtering and sorting controls for listing result pages, allowing users to narrow results by common and listing-specific criteria and see real-time result counts and active-filter summaries.
modules.where_it_fits: This module appears on listing pages reached from the top navigation (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and from the home page search widget; it augments search results by offering left‑sidebar filters, sorting controls above results, and active-filter summaries during the browsing and booking discovery flow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A search has been performed and listing results for a selected category (Hotels, Flights, Tours, or Cars) are displayed

modules.summary: Displays aggregate scores and individual guest reviews for listings, including category-specific ratings, written comments, photos, and filtering by rating, date, or traveler type.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from listing and detail pages within the Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars sections of the main navigation and exposed on detail pages as a dedicated Reviews section; review submission is also reachable via the user Dashboard or post-stay email prompts after bookings. It complements search/listing workflows by surfacing social proof and post-stay feedback during the booking lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Viewing: public access (no login required); Submitting: authenticated user with a completed/recorded booking (post-stay).

modules.summary: Displays promotional banners and featured deal cards with discount details, validity, terms, filtering by service/destination/dates, and actions that apply promo codes or redirect to pre-filled booking searches.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Offers and via homepage promotions/search widget, this section surfaces time-limited, seasonal and last-minute promotions across services (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the booking flows by applying discounts or pre-filling searches. It complements the main search/listing modules and influences subsequent Payment Processing and Booking Management steps.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.

modules.summary: Ends the authenticated session by clearing sensitive session data and returning the user to the public home page.
modules.where_it_fits: Located under the Account/Login area of the main navigation and accessible from the user dashboard; it is used at the end of a user's authenticated session to ensure protected areas require re-authentication. After logout, attempts to access protected pages are routed to the login page.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is authenticated with an active session (logged in) and may be on the dashboard or any protected page.
